notes: Re-assessment after #719/#775 + the finalizeSummary total_tokens surfacing: antigravity's conversations/<conv>.db is captured (curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh) and served in replay (StageReplayStore); applyDBMetrics (parser.go:180) lights SessionMetrics.TotalTokens (context occupancy) on each turn_done, and finalizeSummary (cmd/replay/metrics.go:59) now surfaces it into the golden summary.total_tokens gated to antigravity. The token half is therefore GENUINELY observable: total_tokens_nonzero (summary.total_tokens>0, observations.go:165) passes. NOTE total_tokens is a context-occupancy snapshot (current in-context prompt tokens, grows with the conversation, non-decreasing), NOT the per-turn cum-usage accumulator the scenario describes for claudecode — so the cum-based tokens_nonzero (cum_input+cum_output>0) stays 0 and is NOT asserted, and COST + CACHE-READ are deferred to #716 (the per-turn input/output/cache proto fields are unlabeled with no ground truth). Lifecycle: three back-to-back tool-less turns drive a single conv-id session through ready->working->ready x3 (each turn_end anchored to its OWN turn_start so the matcher picks the post-turn ready). Single-birth adapter: session_id = <conv-id> dir from launch, so birth anchors to start UNPINNED (no presession two-phase model). Model left provisional: #719 writes the db canonical dash-form id over the <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> display name in a served-store recording, so record fills model_name.

text: Conv-id-keyed session appears in ready after the first turn (when agy writes transcript.jsonl)
Turn 1 user prompt drives ready -> working
Turn 1 completes back to ready; turn_done reads the store and lights TotalTokens -> summary.total_tokens > 0
Turn 2 user prompt drives ready -> working
Turn 2 completes back to ready; TotalTokens (context occupancy) is non-decreasing vs T1
Turn 3 user prompt drives ready -> working
Turn 3 completes back to ready; TotalTokens non-decreasing across 3 turns (context-occupancy snapshot, not the cum_input+output the tokens_nonzero assertion reads)
